channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bins are eyesores and obstructing those with mobility needs & pushchairs, 22nd June
item.description:
This bins permanently on the pavement for long time and obstructing those with mobility needs. There are visually impaired people using the pavement all the time. This blind people are residents of Bradbury Oak House, Underhill Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lordship Lane, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are 6 to 7 grey sacks of rubbish on Phineas Pett Roadat the botof the alleyway (Kakehill) that leads to Ross Way. Similar sacks were left outside No 41 Ross Way earlier in the week, 21st June
item.description:
Grey sacks dumped on Phineas Pett Road between 33 and 34
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Phineas Pett Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Picknic table, 21st June
item.description:
Broken picknic table and bench next to the Mardyke House. Someone also place the table on fire. Currently safery hazard. Need to be taking down or alternatively replaced.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crosslet Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flags attached to lamposts, 21st June
item.description:
A home in our local area is using their private flagpole to attaché bunting to a neighbouring public lampost.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edward Tyler Road, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped clothes, 21st June
item.description:
Pile of dumped clothes which have been there for at least two weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dickens Close, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass is too long, 21st June
item.description:
Several residents reporting long grass all around the area. This are is long and needs to be maintained to keep the area nice. Residents with dogs fear for vet bills due to the head seeds, and children can't play on the green. It's a joke, poor roads and poor maintenance. What are we paying council tax for?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, Doveney Close, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian guardrail was damaged, 21st June
item.description:
The pedestrian guardrail in Lordship Lane & Wood Vale was damaged for almost 2weeks. It needs an immediate repair for health & safety of the pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lordship Lane, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bricks in kerb, 21st June
item.description:
Resident has put bricks in gutter to access the, property 116 Carlton road erith kent needs to apply for dropped kerb £££
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated speeding, 21st June
item.description:
Repeatedly cars are speeding and drifting on the roundabout.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harrow Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access and driveway, 21st June
item.description:
Blocking 4 garages access and emergency access

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abundance of wheelie bins, 21st June
item.description:
Wheelie bins on Matfield rd /swaylands road About 30 at last count About 20 on swaylands road at the bottom This is illegal now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Matfield Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping in the rear alleyway between Highland Road and Oakhouse Road — mixed household and garden waste, 21st June
item.description:
A large amount of waste has been dumped in the shared rear alleyway that runs behind the houses, between Highland Road and Oakhouse Road. It is behind the no.58 I think. It includes several full bin bags of household rubbish, garden waste. It’s partly blocking the alley and is a fire and hygiene hazard that could attract vermin. I first noticed it today. Some of it looks like it has been building up for a while. Please could it be cleared.Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highland Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Seesaw needs oiling and a new spring, 21st June
item.description:
The children’s seesaw needs to be oiled and have a new spring to make it bounce up and down again
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roseberry Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame, mattress, pillows and duvet, 21st June
item.description:
These items have been left for over 10 days with no sign saying that they are to be collected by the council.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Shaw Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building rubble on pavement, 21st June
item.description:
This rubble has been here for almost a week and this same House has building works going on until evenings on weekends

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive fridge, 21st June
item.description:
Blocking residents area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on pavement, 21st June
item.description:
This was left in Sunday 21st A large bag of rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Blenheim Grove, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 21st June
item.description:
The road surface has broken up causing a pothole which needs repair please.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gundulph Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vans constantly parking on double yellow lines infront of bike shed, 21st June
item.description:
Vans constantly parking on double yellow lines infront of bike shed. As no traffic wardens pass this keeps happening and is dangerous as pedestrians cannot be seen by oncoming vehicles as they approach the end of the road. This is a busy pedestrian route and with school children and parking like this is dangerous. I have witness a few near collisions

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Phoebeth Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please clean graffiti, 21st June
item.description:
Please clean graffiti on the Railway Footbridge Queensway/Petts Wood Rd, this one is on the entrance at the Queensway end of the bridge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queensway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
